glosses.ja: 芸術家; パフォーマー

translations.it: Sono un artista alle prime armi.
translations.vi: Tôi là nghệ sĩ mới vào nghề.
translations.nb: Jeg er en nybegynner som kunstner.
translations.sv: Jag är en nybörjare som konstnär.
translations.da: Jeg er en begynder som kunstner.
translations.ja: 私は駆け出しのアーティストです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Copular auxiliary (être), present indicative 1st singular, links subject to a predicate.
Common noun used as a predicative complement with the copula.
Adjective modifying 'artiste', masculine singular, meaning 'beginner/novice'.

sentences.target: Ma sœur est artiste depuis deux ans.

translations.fr: Ma sœur est artiste depuis deux ans.
translations.en: My sister has been an artist for two years.
translations.es: Mi hermana es artista desde hace dos años.
translations.de: Meine Schwester ist seit zwei Jahren Künstlerin.
translations.it: Mia sorella è artista da due anni.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹当艺术家已经两年了。
translations.yue: 我妹妹做咗藝術家兩年。
translations.ru: Моя сестра художница уже два года.
translations.pt: Minha irmã é artista há dois anos.
translations.vi: Chị tôi đã làm nghệ sĩ được hai năm.
translations.nl: Mijn zus is al twee jaar kunstenaar.
translations.uk: Моя сестра вже два роки художниця.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन दो साल से कलाकार है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra jest artystką od dwóch lat.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου είναι καλλιτέχνιδα εδώ και δύο χρόνια.
translations.nb: Søsteren min har vært kunstner i to år.
translations.id: Saudara perempuan saya sudah menjadi seniman selama dua tahun.
translations.sv: Min syster har varit konstnär i två år.
translations.ro: Sora mea este artistă de doi ani.
translations.cs: Moje sestra je už dva roky umělkyní.
translations.da: Min søster har været kunstner i to år.
translations.fi: Siskoni on ollut taiteilija kaksi vuotta.
translations.ja: 私の妹は芸術家になって二年です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular possessor, feminine singular, agrees with 'sœur'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Copular auxiliary (être), present indicative 3rd singular, links subject to a predicative noun.
Common noun used as a predicative complement after 'est'.
Preposition introducing a time-span/start point phrase.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'ans'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'depuis'.

sentences.target: On veut être artiste un jour.

translations.fr: On veut être artiste un jour.
translations.en: We want to be artists one day.
translations.de: Wir wollen eines Tages Künstler werden.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想有一天成为艺术家。
translations.yue: 我哋想有一日做藝術家。
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים להיות אמנים יום אחד.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn trở thành nghệ sĩ vào một ngày nào đó.
translations.ar: نريد أن نصبح فنانين يوماً ما.
translations.nl: We willen op een dag artiesten worden.
translations.hi: हम एक दिन कलाकार बनना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε κάποια μέρα να γίνουμε καλλιτέχνες.
translations.nb: Vi vil bli kunstnere en dag.
translations.id: Kami ingin menjadi seniman suatu hari nanti.
translations.sv: Vi vill bli konstnärer en dag.
translations.ro: Vrem să devenim artiști într-o zi.
translations.da: Vi vil gerne blive kunstnere en dag.
translations.ja: 私たちはいつか芸術家になりたいです。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal subject pronoun, often used for generic 'one' or colloquial 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd singular.
Copular verb in the infinitive, complement of 'veut', introducing the predicate 'artiste'.
Common noun serving as predicative complement of 'être'.
Determiner before a temporal noun; here forms the idiomatic time phrase 'un jour' ('one day').
Common noun; temporal complement.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons un artiste dans le quartier.
sentences.reading: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ œ̃ aʁtist dɑ̃ lə kaʁtje/

translations.fr: Nous cherchons un artiste dans le quartier.
translations.ipa: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ œ̃ aʁtist dɑ̃ lə kaʁtje/
translations.en: We are looking for an artist in the neighborhood.
translations.es: Estamos buscando a un artista en el barrio.
translations.de: Wir suchen einen Künstler in der Nachbarschaft.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un artista nel quartiere.
translations.ko: 우리는 이 동네에서 예술가를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在附近寻找一位艺术家。
translations.yue: 我哋喺附近搵緊一位藝術家。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um artista no bairro.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một nghệ sĩ trong khu phố.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن فنان في الحي.
translations.nl: We zijn op zoek naar een kunstenaar in de buurt.
translations.hi: हम पड़ोस में एक कलाकार की तलाश कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en kunstner i nabolaget.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari seorang seniman di lingkungan.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en konstnär i kvarteret.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en kunstner i kvarteret.
translations.ja: 私たちは近所で芸術家を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative 1st plural.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introduces a new referent.
Common noun, direct object of 'cherchons'.
Preposition marking location.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.
